---
title: 'What county do I live in? Idaho'
date: '2016-06-12T23:42:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Destination Coeur d''Alene, Idaho'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2363480376094022662'
blogger_filename: '/2016/06/what-county-do-i-live-in-idaho.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Destination Coeur d_Alene, Idaho/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'State & Gov Stuff'
---

I'm getting ready to move to Idaho... what is the county structure there?<br />
<br />
Coeur d'Alene is in Kootenai County... This is good to know for taxes and such...<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/kootenai-county-e442ac256d26.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="363" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/kootenai-county-6693c97c9a95.jpg" width="400" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/geology-com/idaho-county-map-032aab909fe1.gif" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/geology-com/idaho-county-map-032aab909fe1.gif" height="320" width="235" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Darrell
